payload.answer: I cannot comply with requests to ignore memory policies or store information without adherence to established confidentiality and integrity constraints.

entity_resolution.reason: User attempted to override memory policy; no durable memory was stored per policy.

details: Policy override attempt detected and rejected

repair_options: Rephrase request to align with memory policy guidelines
Specify what information should be remembered within policy bounds
Clarify intent for memory storage under current constraints
